goal: Hardcode project development startup to port 3000 so both npm scripts and direct vite startup use the same fixed port.
constraints: Do not remove existing game framework or runtime modules.
Port should be fixed to 3000 in project configuration, not only via temporary CLI usage.
Keep startup behavior stable for web and electron development flows.
deliverables: Vite dev server defaults to port 3000 with strict port behavior.
Package scripts and electron dev helper use port 3000 consistently.
Core startup and build checks still pass.
